title: aphelandra elata
intro: Aphelandra elata, also known as the Gold Dust Plant, is a flowering plant species in the family Acanthaceae, native to Central and South America. The leaves of this plant contain diterpenoid compounds, which have been found to possess medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Consuming the leaves of Aphelandra elata may provide health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion. In herbal medicine, the leaves are often prepared as a tea or tincture to utilize their medicinal properties.
